title: hieracium dasytrichum subsp. neopolytrichum
intro: Hieracium dasytrichum subsp. neopolytrichum, commonly known as hawkweed or Hieracium, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in the treatment of wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Hieracium dasytrichum subsp. neopolytrichum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Hieracium dasytrichum subsp. neopolytrichum can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures for topical and internal use.
